changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO role_permission (role_id, permission_id) SELECT r.id, p.id FROM roles r JOIN permissions p ON p.code = 'pos:cancel_sale' WHERE r.code = 'CASHIER' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM role_permission rp WHERE rp.role_id = r.id AND rp.permission_id = p.id);
